headline: EQT Q2 Earnings Call Highlights Demand Deals, Higher Output
summary: EQT raised 2026 production guidance, advanced demand-linked deals and highlighted buybacks as it targets growth from Appalachian opportunities.

raw.headline: EQT Q2 Earnings Call Highlights Demand Deals, Higher Output
raw.summary: EQT raised 2026 production guidance, advanced demand-linked deals and highlighted buybacks as it targets growth from Appalachian opportunities.

headline: Compared to Estimates, EQT (EQT) Q2 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics
summary: The headline numbers for EQT (EQT) give insight into how the company performed in the quarter ended June 2026, but it may be worthwhile to compare some of its key metrics to Wall Street estimates and the year-ago actuals.
